title: My First Blog Post

This is the first paragraph of my first blog post. It contains some sample content.

This is the second paragraph, demonstrating more content with a link.

title: Is this my first blog post?
content:
Next.js 16 introduces some amazing features for developers. The App Router and Turbopack make development faster than ever.

In this post, we explore how to build a blog with Tailwind CSS and TypeScript.
